verdict_reasoning: HSPA5/BiP is canonically ER-luminal but translocates to the cell surface under ER stress and in cancer cells through saturation of KDEL-retrieval machinery. It then associates peripherally with cell-surface GPI-anchored proteins and mediates functional interactions (viral binding, signaling). Surface display occurs under documented pathological conditions (ER stress, tumorigenesis) rather than at baseline. The protein reaches the outer leaflet via its own stress-escape mechanism coupled to stable peripheral anchoring to surface proteins.
